title: payment_watcher: scan_block is async but does no I/O — should be sync fn
description: relay/src/payment_watcher.rs:253-342: scan_block is declared async fn and called with .await, but the function's only async operation is calling activate_subscription() which IS async. However, scan_block itself iterates the block's outputs synchronously and then calls the async activate_subscription. The async is justified by the inner await. No change needed — this is correct. Removing the async label for clarity is not possible without refactoring. Withdraw this flag.
